results.name: suki
results.description: Leader of the Kyoshi Warriors in Avatar: The Last Airbender.

results.name: sultai
results.description: The Sultai Brood, a clan of Tarkir.

results.name: sultai symbol
results.description: The dragon's fang.

results.name: sunbeam
results.description: A ray of light emanating from the sun. See also [crepuscular rays](https://tagger.scryfall.com/tags/artwork/crepuscular-ray) for multiple columns of lights separated by sections of darkness.

results.name: sunburst
results.description: Artifacts enter with a charge counter for each color of mana spent to cast them; creatures enter with +1/+1 counters.

results.name: sunder
results.description: Remove everything attached to a permanent while possibly leaving the permanent behind. (Some of these taggings consider the permanent might be indestructible.)

results.name: sun dog
results.description: Sun dogs and moon dogs are an atmospheric phenomenon where two bright spots appear either side of the sun/moon, sometimes alongside a halo.

results.name: sun empire
results.description: A Mayincatec empire on Ixalan that worships the sun and lives alongside dinosaurs.

results.name: sunstar free company
results.description: The Celestial Palatinate's de facto state army in the war against the Monoist faith.

results.name: super-menace
results.description: Because you can get more menacing than menace.

results.name: super-pridemate
results.description: Put +1/+1 counters equal to the amount of life gained.

results.name: supervoid
results.description: Quasi-black holes with a light-emitting photon ring around them.

results.name: support
results.description: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of up to N target creatures.

results.name: sural
results.description: Gideon's weapon, a set of bladed whips. (Better known as an urumi in the real world.)

results.name: surge
results.description: Get a benefit if you've cast another spell this turn.

results.name: sursi
results.description: A large plateau in the Aerona region of Dominaria, and also a village in the same area.

results.name: surtland
results.description: One of the ten realms of Kaldheim, land of giants.

results.name: surveil
results.description: Cards that let you look at the top # cards of your library and put some into the graveyard.

results.name: susan foreman
results.description: The Doctor's granddaughter.

results.name: susur secundi
results.description: Sothera's first planet, a dark world used as a base of operations by the Monoists in the system.

results.name: swamp
results.description: Swamps, bogs, marshes, wetlands, and the like.

results.name: swap removal
results.description: Sorry I messed up your stuff. Here's a thing in exchange. (See also [humble](/tags/card/humble).)

results.name: sweeper
results.description: _o\ Destroy all the things! See also [spot removal](spot-removal) and [multi removal](multi-removal).

results.name: sweeper-graveyard
results.description: Remove all cards from one or more graveyards

results.name: sweeper-one-sided
results.description: Sweepers that are, or have high potential to be, one-sided.
